'STOP, TRUCK 1. STOP.' AIR CANADA CRASH LIVE UPDATES

‘Stop, Truck 1. Stop.’ Air traffic control recording captures moments before fatal Air Canada crash. Follow for live updates.

An Air Canada jet travelling from Montreal to New York City’s LaGuardia Airport Sunday night crashed into a fire truck after landing on a runway, killing the flight’s two pilots and injuring dozens of passengers. Follow for live updates.

LIVE: Aftermath of Air Canada plane crash at LaGuardia airport in New York City

FULL STORY: Two pilots flying Air Canada jet killed in crash at LaGuardia Airport
